terms.title: TERMS OF USE
terms.welcome: Welcome to MiniSocial – a mini social network platform that allows users to connect, share, and interact.
terms.usageConsent: By accessing or using our service, you agree to comply with the terms below.

sections.s1Li1: You must be 13 years or older to use the service.
sections.s1Li2: You are responsible for your account (email, password).
sections.s1Li3: Do not impersonate others or provide false information.
sections.s2Text: You need to register an account to use all functions. You must keep your login info secure. We have the right to suspend or delete accounts if violations are found.
sections.s3DutyText: You are responsible for the content you post, including: Posts, images, videos, comments.
sections.s4Text: We collect and process data according to the Privacy Policy. We do not share personal data with third parties without consent (unless required by law).
sections.s5Text: We have the right to: Change or upgrade the system; Temporarily suspend service for maintenance; Delete content or accounts that violate terms.
sections.s6Text: You must not: Attack the system (hack, DDOS, exploit); Unauthorized data collection; Use spam bots; Distributed malware.
sections.s7Text: You retain ownership of your content. When posting, you grant us the right to use that content to operate the system.
sections.s8Text: We are not responsible for the content posted by users. We do not guarantee service will always operate continuously or without errors.
sections.s9Text: Terms can be updated at any time. Continued use means you accept the changes.
sections.s10Text: If you have questions, please contact Email: support.socialmini@gmail.com

mentalLetter.title: Heartfelt Letter From The Sleep-Deprived Dev - Notebook
mentalLetter.intro: Introducing the technological masterpiece from a sleep-deprived dev: **Web Version 1.0.0** – where everything that can go wrong, goes wrong.
mentalLetter.chatDesc: Sending is like throwing messages into space, not knowing if it arrived or is lost with *'Lac Troi'*.
mentalLetter.commentDesc: Commeting then disappearing as if it never existed, server probably read it, found it cringe and deleted it for you.
mentalLetter.notifDesc: Lagging like Yahoo Messenger back in 2005, disappears when needed, appears like a ghost when not.
mentalLetter.loadDesc: Sometimes fast, sometimes slow, depending on the server's mood that day.
mentalLetter.uiDesc: One look and you know it was coded in *'leave it for tomorrow'* state, and that 'tomorrow' is probably next year.
mentalLetter.seniorDream: So many bugs that if I fixed them all, I'd probably become a senior... 🤡
mentalLetter.footer: Anyway, a 'poor' web is still my baby. I promise to fix it gradually, listen to feedback, and optimize so it's not known as **'online trash'**.
mentalLetter.warning: For now, just use it, report bugs gently, don't scream too much or I'll get sensitive and... **fix even slower**.
mentalLetter.fatalError: [FATAL ERROR]: No manual included! Figure it out yourself because it's buggy as hell!
